hero.title: Transform your agriculture with
hero.subtitle: Complete agricultural management platform. Parcels, teams, inventory, satellite analysis, soil and profitability. All in one place.

features.title: Complete features
features.subtitle: All the tools you need to manage your farm
features.parcelDesc: Manage your parcels with precision. Track crops, surfaces and geospatial data.
features.teamDesc: Permanent employees and day laborers. Attendance, wages and optimized scheduling.
features.satelliteDesc: NDVI, NDWI, NDMI indices to monitor crop health via satellite.
features.soilDesc: pH, humidity, NPK, organic matter. Laboratory and field analyses.
features.stockDesc: Inputs, fertilizers, seeds. Low stock alerts and expiration management.
features.profitabilityDesc: Calculate costs and revenues per parcel. Optimize your profitability.
features.analyticsDesc: Customizable dashboards. Export your data and reports.
features.infrastructureDesc: Equipment, buildings, irrigation systems. Maintenance and tracking.
features.weatherDesc: Integrated weather forecasts and utility services for your farm.
features.multiOrgDesc: Manage multiple farms. Permissions and roles per organization.
features.secureDesc: Secure authentication, Supabase RLS. Your data is protected.
features.realtimeDesc: Real-time updates with React Query. Reactive interface.

benefits.title: Why choose AGROGINA?
benefits.productivityDesc: Automate your tasks and save time on daily management.
benefits.costReductionDesc: Optimize your inputs and reduce waste through data.
benefits.betterYieldsDesc: Make data-driven decisions to maximize your harvests.
benefits.sustainableDesc: Reduce your environmental impact with precise management.

cta.title: Ready to modernize your agriculture?
cta.subtitle: Join agricultural teams already optimizing their operations.

footer.tagline: The complete platform to modernize your agriculture.

seo.title: AGROGINA - The All-in-One Agricultural Management Suite | Morocco
seo.description: AGROGINA revolutionizes agriculture in Morocco. A unique platform to manage production, finance, HR, inventory and marketing. Precision agriculture and simplified farm management.
seo.keywords: agricultural management, agriculture software morocco, agricultural erp, parcels, NDVI, satellite analysis, agricultural accounting, farm management, precision agriculture, agricultural marketplace, fruit quality control, agricultural labor management, agrogina, agritech

step1.title: Welcome to AgriTech! 🌾
step1.content: Discover how to efficiently manage your farm. This guided tour will introduce you to the main features of the platform.

step2.title: Main Navigation
step2.content: Use this menu to access all sections of the application: farms, parcels, tasks, stock, accounting and more.

step3.title: Organization Switcher
step3.content: If you manage multiple farms, you can easily switch between them here.

step4.title: Your Profile
step4.content: Access your settings, preferences and logout options from this menu.

step1.title: Complete App Tour 🌾
step1.content: Discover all the features of AgriTech in one complete guided tour. We will go through each module of the platform.

step2.title: 1. Main Navigation
step2.content: The sidebar gives you access to all modules. Let's explore each section of your farm together.

step3.title: 2. Multi-Organization
step3.content: AgriTech is multi-tenant. Manage multiple farms from a single account and easily switch between them.

step4.title: 3. Dashboard
step4.content: Your command center. View key statistics, urgent tasks and crop health status at a glance.

step5.title: 4. Farm Management
step5.content: Organize your operations into farms and sub-farms. Each farm can contain multiple parcels with their own crops.

step6.title: 5. Parcels
step6.content: Define your parcels with their geographic boundaries, soil types, irrigation systems and crops.

step7.title: 6. Inventory
step7.content: Track your input stock: seeds, fertilizers, plant protection products, equipment. Receive low stock alerts.

step8.title: 7. Infrastructure
step8.content: Manage your buildings, wells, basins, pumping stations and other equipment.

step9.title: 8. Personnel
step9.content: Manage your team: workers, assigned tasks. Track their hours and calculate their salaries.

step10.title: 9. Production
step10.content: Track your campaigns, crop cycles, harvests and quality control. Complete production traceability.

step11.title: 10. Sales & Purchases
step11.content: Create quotes, purchase orders and manage your commercial transactions.

step12.title: 11. Accounting
step12.content: Double-entry accounting adapted to agriculture. Chart of accounts, journals, invoices and financial reports.

step13.title: 12. Reports
step13.content: Generate detailed reports: production, profitability, labor. Export to PDF or Excel.

step14.title: 13. Settings & Profile
step14.content: Access your personal settings, preferences, organization configuration and logout options from this menu.

step15.title: Ready to Start! 🚀
step15.content: You now have an overview of all features. Click the help button (?) at the bottom right to review this tour or access module guides.

step1.title: Key Statistics
step1.content: View important metrics of your farm at a glance: area, harvests, revenue and ongoing tasks.

step2.title: Recent Tasks
step2.content: Track urgent tasks and their progress directly from the dashboard.

step3.title: Weather
step3.content: Check weather forecasts to plan your agricultural activities.

step4.title: Parcel Overview
step4.content: View the health status of your crops using satellite indices.

step1.title: Your Farms
step1.content: Manage all your agricultural operations from this view. Each farm can contain multiple parcels.

step2.title: Add a Farm
step2.content: Click here to create a new farm and define its characteristics: name, location, area, soil type, etc.

step3.title: Map View
step3.content: View your farms and parcels on the map. You can draw parcel boundaries directly on the map.

step1.title: Parcel List
step1.content: All your parcels are displayed here with their current crops, areas and health status.

step2.title: Filters
step2.content: Filter your parcels by crop, farm or status to quickly find what you're looking for.

step3.title: Quick Actions
step3.content: Quickly access satellite analysis, weather, tasks and profitability for each parcel.

step1.title: Task Management
step1.content: Plan and track all agricultural tasks: irrigation, fertilization, harvest, treatments, etc.

step2.title: Calendar View
step2.content: View your tasks on a calendar to better plan your activities.

step3.title: Create a Task
step3.content: Create new tasks, assign them to workers and set priorities and deadlines.

step1.title: Worker Management
step1.content: Manage your team: permanent workers, day laborers, and sharecroppers. Track their payments and performance.

step2.title: Payments
step2.content: Automatically calculate salaries based on time worked, tasks completed or piece work.

step3.title: Add a Worker
step3.content: Register new team members with their information and payment terms.

step1.title: Stock Overview
step1.content: View the status of your inventory: products in stock, low levels, and total value.

step2.title: Item Catalog
step2.content: Manage your product catalog: inputs, fertilizers, seeds, equipment, etc.

step3.title: Warehouses
step3.content: Organize your stock by warehouse and track movements between locations.

step4.title: Stock Movements
step4.content: Record entries, exits and stock transfers with complete traceability.

step1.title: Accounting
step1.content: Manage all your agricultural accounting: invoices, payments, journals and financial reports.

step2.title: Invoices
step2.content: Create and manage your customer and supplier invoices. Track payments and receivables.

step3.title: Accounting Journal
step3.content: Record your journal entries in double-entry according to the agricultural chart of accounts.

step4.title: Financial Reports
step4.content: Generate reports: balance sheet, income statement, trial balance, and profitability analyses.

step1.title: Satellite Analysis
step1.content: View the health of your crops using satellite imagery. NDVI, NDWI and other indices help you detect problems.

step2.title: Vegetation Indices
step2.content: Compare different indices to understand the status of your crops: water stress, vegetative vigor, etc.

step3.title: History
step3.content: Navigate through time to see the evolution of your parcels and detect trends.

step1.title: Reports
step1.content: Access all your reports: production, finance, labor, and profitability analyses.

step2.title: Export
step2.content: Export your reports to PDF or Excel to share or archive them.

step3.title: Filters and Periods
step3.content: Customize your reports by filtering by period, farm, parcel or crop type.

step1.title: Harvest Statistics
step1.content: View the summary of your harvests: total quantities, estimated value, distribution by crop.

step2.title: Harvest List
step2.content: All your harvests are listed here with date, parcel, crop, quantity and quality.

step3.title: New Harvest
step3.content: Record a new harvest by specifying the parcel, quantity harvested and product quality.

step4.title: Filters
step4.content: Filter your harvests by period, farm, crop or status to quickly find information.

step1.title: Your Infrastructure
step1.content: Manage all your buildings and equipment: wells, basins, pumping stations, hangars, offices.

step2.title: Add Infrastructure
step2.content: Create new infrastructure with their type, location, capacity and commissioning date.

step3.title: Maintenance
step3.content: Plan and track maintenance of your equipment to avoid breakdowns and optimize their lifespan.

step1.title: Billing Overview
step1.content: View the summary of your billing: quotes in progress, orders to deliver, invoices to collect.

step2.title: Quotes
step2.content: Create professional quotes for your clients. Track their status: sent, accepted, converted to order.

step3.title: Purchase Orders
step3.content: Manage your customer and supplier orders. Track deliveries and receipts.

step4.title: Invoices
step4.content: Issue invoices and track payments. Manage reminders and customer receivables.

step5.title: Customers and Suppliers
step5.content: Manage your address book: customers, suppliers, transporters with their contact details and history.

step1.title: Settings
step1.content: Access all your organization settings from this menu.

step2.title: Organization
step2.content: Configure your farm information: name, address, logo, currency and fiscal year.

step3.title: Users
step3.content: Manage your team members, their roles and access permissions to the platform.

step4.title: Subscription
step4.content: Check your current plan, included features and upgrade if needed.

step5.title: Modules
step5.content: Enable or disable modules according to your needs: accounting, satellite, sharecropping, etc.

step6.title: Preferences
step6.content: Customize your experience: language, theme, date format, notifications.

confirm.postDescription: This will update inventory quantities and create stock movements. This action cannot be undone.
confirm.cancelDescription: This will mark the entry as cancelled. Stock quantities will not be affected.
confirm.deleteDescription: This will permanently delete the entry. Only draft entries can be deleted.

form.noItems: No items available. Create items first.

noBoundary.title: Parcel location data is required for weather analysis.
noBoundary.description: Please define the parcel boundaries to access weather & climate analyses.

weather.title: Weather & Climate Analysis

insights.comparison: Data is compared to long-term climate normals (LTN) to identify significant deviations from usual conditions.
insights.wetDay: A wet day is defined as a day with more than 1mm of precipitation. Dry periods are analyzed to optimize irrigation management.
insights.drought: Drought conditions (5 consecutive days with less than 5mm) require special attention for crop water management.

weather.noData: Select a period to display weather analyses

et.description: Evapotranspiration (ET) is the total water loss from land to the atmosphere, combining evaporation (water turning into vapor from soil, water bodies, or wet surfaces) and transpiration (water released by plants through their leaves). ET₀ (reference ET) is key for irrigation planning.
et.irrigationInsight: ET₀ represents the water demand of the atmosphere. Multiply ET₀ by the crop coefficient (Kc) to estimate actual crop water needs (ETc = ET₀ × Kc). Higher ET₀ values indicate greater irrigation requirements.

noBoundary.title: Parcel boundary data is required for satellite analysis.
noBoundary.description: Please define the parcel boundaries to access satellite imagery features.

accountMappings.title: Account Mappings
accountMappings.description: Configure how business events map to GL accounts for automatic journal entries.
accountMappings.noPermission: You do not have permission to manage account mappings.
accountMappings.infoDescription: Account mappings link business events (like task completion or harvest sales) to specific GL accounts. When a task is completed or a harvest is sold, the system automatically creates journal entries using these mappings.
accountMappings.noSearchResults: No mappings found matching your filters.
accountMappings.empty: No account mappings configured. Click "Initialize Defaults" to set up standard mappings, or add them manually.

create.title: Create Account Mapping
create.description: Map a business event to a GL account.

delete.title: Delete Account Mapping
delete.description: Are you sure you want to delete the mapping for "{{key}}"? This will not affect existing journal entries, but new automatic entries will fail without this mapping.

form.activeHelp: Inactive mappings are ignored during journal creation.
